title: stelis buxiflora
intro: Stelis buxiflora, also known as the Buxiflora Orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis buxiflora include its ability to aid in the treatment of various ailments such as fever, sore throat, and skin conditions. In terms of herbal preparations, Stelis buxiflora can be consumed as a tea or infused in oil to extract its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses.
